reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. An attacker can trigger this via P2P sync protocol (downloadByRoot/downloadByRange) by sending a DataColumnSidecar where column.length != kzgCommitments.length, causing mismatched array lengths to be passed to asyncVerifyCellKzgProofBatch (line 353), which violates the KZG batch verification invariant and can lead to incorrect verification, undefined behavior in native KZG library, or node crash.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: EIP-7594 PeerDAS - verify_cell_kzg_proof_batch requires len(commitments) == len(cell_indices) == len(cells) == len(proofs)
